Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents is off calendar per request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to show cause to plaintiff's counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No.4, Administrative fee, is ordered off calendar/Complied. Proceedings reported by: Christina Paxton, CSR# 1558 (212)

Notice Of Motion And Defts' Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Respond To Requests For Production [Ccp Sect 2031.300] Request For Sanctions [C.C.P. Sect 2023]
Off Calendar Sep-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Mo Choi's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. As this motion was filed on August 17, 2006 and served by mail, the first day this motion could be noticed for is September 18, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Defts' Motion To Compel Pltf To Further Respond To Form Interrogs [Ccp Sect 2030.300] Request For Sanction [Ccp Sect 2023]
Off Calendar Sep-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Mo Choi's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. As this motion was filed on August 17, 2006 and served by mail, the first day this motion could be noticed for is September 18, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
